title: Fauna database secret keys should not be disclosed
description: Fauna is a serverless document database with a GraphQL API. Fauna uses secret keys for authentication — server keys for full database access and client keys for restricted access. Exposing server keys provides complete database control including reading and modifying all collections and documents.
recommendation: Remove Fauna secret keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate immediately at dashboard.fauna.com.
impact: Full read/write access to all Fauna database collections, documents, and functions.

checks.message: Fauna database secret key detected (fn prefix). Fauna secret keys authenticate queries to the Fauna serverless database. Server keys (fnS prefix) provide full database access including reading all collections, creating/modifying/deleting documents, and executing stored functions. Exposing a server key allows complete database compromise. Revoke immediately at dashboard.fauna.com and rotate all affected data if sensitive information was exposed.
Fauna secret key detected in variable assignment. Fauna keys control serverless database access for all collections and documents. Rotate immediately at dashboard.fauna.com.
